name: integration__how_to_clone_your_competitors_entire_t
method: how to clone your competitor's entire tech stack in 60 secondsbuiltwith .com shows every tool, app, and integration running on any domain. email platform. analytics. payment processor. review app. su

phases.name: collect_domains
steps: pull competitor domains from COMPETITIVE_INTEL.csv and COMPETITOR_FACTORY_MAP.csv
deduplicate and prioritize by revenue signal

phases.name: analyze
steps: diff competitor stacks vs our TECH_STACK_INTEL.csv
score tool adoption frequency across competitors
flag tools we dont use that 3+ competitors do

phases.name: output
steps: generate content thread: top tools competitors use
create tool swap recommendations in OPS/
